# CSS Uncenter

> The anti-centering tool — un-center every perfectly aligned element with physics and chaos.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — main application entry
- src/components/ — UI components (preview, slider, CSS output panel, chaos controls)
- src/components/DevToolsPanel.tsx — Chrome DevTools panel clone
- src/components/LighthouseReport.tsx — Lighthouse centering report with SVG gauges
- src/components/ChangelogProTier.tsx — Changelog and Pro Tier (3 tiers)
- src/hooks/ — custom React hooks
- src/constants.ts — mode definitions and configuration
- src/utils.ts — physics calculations and CSS generation

## Features
- 4 un-centering modes (Drift, Earthquake, Gravity, Chaos), live preview
- Before/after slider, CSS output panel, score system, hidden chaos panel
- Chrome DevTools Panel clone
- Lighthouse Centering Report (SVG gauges)
- Fake Changelog
- Pro Tier (3 tiers)

## URLs
- Live: https://css-uncenter.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/css-uncenter
